ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the passenger survived */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" INTEGER /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "family_members" TEXT /* Names of family members traveling together */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number, if applicable */,
  "body_recovery" TEXT /* Details of body recovery, if applicable */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the passenger, if available */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabin_details ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the passenger */,
  "family_size" TEXT /* Family size of the passenger */,
  "cabin_deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "deck_access" TEXT /* Decks accessible to passengers of this class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in this class */,
  "fare_details" TEXT /* Detailed fare information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "sailing_date" TEXT /* Date the Titanic sailed from the port */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date the Titanic arrived at the port */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Travel time from the port to the next destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger the contribution is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., correction, additional info) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Details of the contribution */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was submitted */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contribution was approved */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the contribution */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who approved the contribution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed and approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, genealogist, educator) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the ship where the cabin is located */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)
column_names: Boolean indicating if the passenger survived
